shared_context.goal: Loosefruit tab inputs missing brondol rows from staging-vs-Plantware selisih, across selected estates, using one browser window/session per estate and many tabs inside that window.
shared_context.existing_ui: app/ui/main_window.py already has Loosefruit Brondol tab and sequential per-estate runner orchestration.
shared_context.existing_runner: runner/src/cli.ts dispatches operation=input_loosefruit to loosefruit input or loosefruit multitab runner.
shared_context.input_rule: Use selisih = staging_brondol - plantware_brondol; input only positive selisih by default; skip zero/negative and already-present Plantware grid rows.
shared_context.session_rule: One estate/location uses one reused Plantware session/browser window; max_tabs controls pages/tabs in that window; multiple selected estates run sequentially unless session isolation is explicitly redesigned.
shared_context.critical_conflict_note: Repo has existing uncommitted changes in app/ui/main_window.py, app/core/models.py, runner/src/cli.ts, runner/src/types.ts, and others; implementation must review diffs before editing and not overwrite WIP.

risk_notes: Existing loosefruit feature is partly present, but uses direct requests in UI preview and hardcoded runner endpoint defaults; must unify source URL/config before production use.

User mentioned localhost:3001/upah/staging-comparison while runner currently defaults to localhost:8002/backend/upah/api/staging/staging-comparison; route contract must be normalized or made configurable.
Multi-tab runner currently assigns rows round-robin and uses one loc_code when deriving task code; estate grouping must prevent cross-estate rows in same session/window.
Existing runner only filters emp_code starting with A and selisih > 0; verify this matches brondol worker rules and staging response schema.
Plantware ASP.NET postback timing is fragile; tab concurrency must keep per-page operations isolated and handle closed page/context failures without double input.
Existing active workflow WFS-premi-remarks-sync-missing overlaps app/ui/main_window.py and runner payload types; coordinate before implementation.
